{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322073324BBF0D185680501648795"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264463034339328783","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，情节很流畅，人设很讨喜。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691389663,"group_id":"7252648723820317729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2HXY4pASs+Nhf/tc8i/NrA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"776723506142512","user_name":"喜欢猫耳菜的舒梦兰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"776723506142512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7252648723820317729","book_info":{"abstract":"机敏聪慧手握大女主剧本钢铁直球女vs高岭之花但内心戏超多的反差萌男主
        萧韶和谢瑾的第一次见面是在萧韶的百天宴上，萧韶刚从眼花缭乱的抓周礼中抓住了玉章，
        抬眼便看到被母亲强行推到跟前一脸不情愿的谢瑾，于是一只手拿着玉章另一只手抓住了谢瑾衣角，还在谢瑾弯腰的时候一下咬住了谢瑾的脸，引得众人哈哈大笑。
        后来两人成婚后，萧韶登基。谢瑾因为政务去了江南，大半年都没回京。这可忙坏了信差，书信如雪花般飞向京城……谢瑾在信中写道：
        “臣近日走马踏春，江南景色宜人，政通人和，望殿下心安。闲暇之时得一糕点古籍，按其法所制糕点若干。食之滋味甚妙。惜哉，汝不可食……”随信而来的是一粒小小的红豆。
         萧韶看完在回信中略带不服：“江南糕点虽是一绝。然京中御厨手艺也不遑多让...” 
        反正整封信都是一些鸡零狗碎的日常，直到在信的最后才写道
        “我也想吃你做的糕点，还有...我想你了。” 
       萧韶捻起那粒红豆，珍而重之地把它塞进了贴身带的香囊里。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4f74f925300801fbf59d22a01fbc6a6c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"徐清晏","author_id":"","book_id":"7252648723820317729","book_name":"岁时昭昭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c8d8","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7252648729013191202","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"99133"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"57","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,古色古香","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4f74f925300801fbf59d22a01fbc6a6c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320004&x-signature=v1b66utCLYpP4uWNHZyC2KNt9PU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1603544984596688","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.766572e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322073324BBF0D185680501648795"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":690},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7252648723820317729","book_name":"","book_ty
